Absolon.summary: Dhani god of the great deep.

Aeronauts.summary: Daring sky captains who trade danger for speed and freedom among the clouds.

Alif.summary: A member of the Cintari, Kassai's close friend.

Alshoni.summary: A faction founded by a particular branch of the Royal Bloodline, brought together by blood ties, headed up by Lord Wizard Chiyo, cousin to the Emperor.

Braumeister.summary: Elite brewers of Aria making spirits which possess unique effects.

Chiyo.summary: Lord Wizard, Head of the Alshoni faction and cousin to the Emperor.

Cintari.summary: A group of bloodthirsty brigands who seek the thrill of battle.

Cogwerx.summary: Credited with inventing steam technology and revolutionising Metrix through steam compression for energy, largely responsible for the city's success and development.

DhaniEmpire.summary: A fallen civilisation once ruled by an arcane empress, whose mastery of aether ended in cataclysmic ruin.

Dracai.summary: Bestowed names free of restrictions or stigma, the Dracai are granted positions in the Royal Court of Volcor by the Emperor.

Ezu.summary: A faction headed up by Chancellor Yama.

Fayyad.summary: A member of the Cintari, Kassai's close friend.

FiddlersGreen.summary: An imaginary place where every immortal's whim shall be tended to by demure merfolk.

GoldkissRum.summary: Bright with a rich golden flavour, the most popular drink served at the Kraken's Barrel.

GrandMagister.summary: Serves the city of Solana as the highest representation of Sol.

HandOfSol.summary: Solana's order of knights, who defend the city from outside threats.

Kayat.summary: An illusionist, boss of the Dust Runners.

Kuraghan.summary: A fanatical pirate cult formed from reconditioned convicts. The Kuraghan worship the sea god Absolon and believe dying in battle earns them an afterlife of endless pleasure.

Mendacity.summary: A corporation that maintains control of the media, funding almost every radio station and newspaper in the city.

Min.summary: Fai's mother, Min of the Forest of Flames.

Rosetta.summary: An Order of powerful spell weavers that once stood alongside the likes of the Ollin and the Seers.

Sada.summary: Kassai's sorceress friend and member of the Cintari.

Sayashi.summary: Special force of loyal ninjas dedicated to hunting those responsible for the Emperor's death.

SuperSlam.summary: A deadly combat tournament where fighters battle in the Deathmatch Arena for glory and bloodsport.

Sutcliffe.summary: Pursued arcane knowledge despite lacking aether affinity, creating the Arknight project to unlock magical abilities. Betrayed by his creation, Viserai, he was killed and now exists trapped in a skull, tormented and longing for revenge.

TeklaticDynamism.summary: Energy source invented by Professor Teklovossen.

TekloIndustries.summary: A recent entrant to the steamtech industry, acclaimed for its innovative products and cutting-edge designs driven by a constantly experimenting R&D team.

TheFoundry.summary: An independent radio station, one of the few in Metrix that remains free of Mendacity control.

Volcai.summary: The more limited social class of Volcor; their names are homogeneous, ending in -ai as a mark of their Volcai origin status.

VoltarisGem.summary: A powerful artifact said to have an entire storm trapped within its crystalline walls.

Yama.summary: Lord Chancellor and Head of the Ezu faction.
